title: Ironquay Laboratory Consortium
content:
Juno Langford led a research group at the Ironquay Laboratory Consortium in Frosthaven that advanced resonant cavity interferometry. The group's foundational results were published in 1903.

Theory.

The method relies on low-temperature chambers calibrated against reference beams from a sealed interferometer ring.

Apparatus.

Graduate instrumentation courses now teach the principles behind the 1903 measurement protocol.
